paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58 as of July 22, 2026, with a decrease of 1.05% from the prior close and 24.28% over the last 21 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Fermi Inc. has been in the news recently, with a headline from PR Newswire on July 23, 2026, regarding the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights. This news item is the most recent, and its summary provides some details about the company's focus on developing electric grids.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including an 8-K/A form on July 21, 2026, which discloses the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form on July 15, 2026, which announces the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing, and there are four new social posts in the last 24 hours, including a discussion thread about Fermi America and a mention of Google's raised FY26 CapEx guide.
